import sys, re
for line in sys.stdin:
    b = line.strip()
    if not b or len(b) < 4: continue
    try:
        # Git protocol pkt-line format: 4-char hex length + content
        h = b[:4]
        n = int(h, 16)
        if n == 0 or n > 1000: continue
        content = b[4:]
        # First ref line: HEAD\0... or SHA refs/heads/...
        m = re.search(r'([0-9a-f]{40})\s+(.+)', content)
        if m:
            print('SHA:', m.group(1)[:12], 'REF:', m.group(2).split(chr(0))[0])
    except Exception as e:
        continue
" 2>/dev/null || echo "Git router fetch failed"
